mapper.sql: t.id, t.material_version_id, t.material_id, t.version_no, t.file_url, t.file_name, t.file_type, t.file_size, t.submit_time, t.review_status, t.review_time, t.reviewer_id, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_material_version t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_material_version t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.material_id = #{params.materialId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_material_version ( material_version_id, material_id, version_no, file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size, submit_time, review_status, review_time, reviewer_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{materialVersionId}, #{materialId}, #{versionNo}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{submitTime}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewTime}, #{reviewerId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_material_version ( material_version_id, material_id, version_no, file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size, submit_time, review_status, review_time, reviewer_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.materialVersionId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.versionNo}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.submitTime}, #{item.reviewStatus}, #{item.reviewTime}, #{item.reviewerId}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_material_version t SET
t.review_status = #{reviewStatus},
t.review_time = #{reviewTime},
t.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_material_version t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
